Landing.headline: The council is in session.
Landing.subhead: Convene a panel of AI personas to deliberate a question through a structured protocol and produce a synthesized deliverable.
Landing.phaseOpeningBody: All personas answer the question in parallel, blind to each other. Diversity preserved.
Landing.phaseCritiqueBody: Round-robin critique with a novelty requirement: refine, challenge, or concede.
Landing.phaseConsensusBody: A judge model scores the debate and decides whether another round is worth running.
Landing.phaseAdaptiveBody: If consensus stalls, the weakest voice is silenced and the strongest speaks last.
Landing.phaseSynthesisBody: A secretary model produces the deliverable: decision, key arguments, minority views, next actions.
Landing.featureByokBody: OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google — or local via Ollama or LM Studio. Your keys, your models, your bill.
Landing.featureDurableBody: Workflows run on Inngest, not on the HTTP request. Close the tab — the debate keeps going.
Landing.featureStreamBody: Watch every turn as it streams. Reconnect at any time and replay from any point.
Landing.featurePauseBody: Drop a note between phases. The council sees it before the next round begins.

SessionsDashboard.title: Your sessions
SessionsDashboard.subtitle: All the deliberations you have started.
SessionsDashboard.emptyBody: Start your first deliberation to see it here.
